summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that TEL is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $218.7. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 50.0%. This is a fresh test of the support, suggesting that optimal buy-side liquidity remains intact. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $243.44 and a significant trendline confluence around $233.70 (formed by 7 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
